## Changes
- (describe key changes)

## Checklist
- [ ] Markdown lint passes (`npm run lint:md`)
- [ ] Math delimiter check passes (`npm run lint:math`)
- [ ] Zenn article validation passes (`npm run lint:zenn`)
- [ ] Images are stored under repository-root `images/`
- [ ] Image references use absolute `/images/...` paths
- [ ] References are included
- [ ] Preview articles use `_draft-<final-slug>.md` with `published: false`
- [ ] Release articles use a final slug (`howto-*`, `paper-*`, `repro-*`) before `published: true`
- [ ] No published article slug has been renamed without an explicit Zenn-side cleanup plan
